_notes: Image markers that n8n workflow A6naBMqLH3eRDzjx must replace per-site before WordPress import. Decorative design assets (page background) are self-hosted in ./assets/ and referenced via raw.githubusercontent.com URLs in the template JSON — they do NOT need injection. Marker names follow the cross-template convention established in ainexa-ai-agency/image_markers.json: reusable roles (BRAND_LOGO, BADGE_*, TEAM_*, HERO, TESTIMONIAL_*) use the same name across templates so n8n's Approved-Ready lookup is portable.

IMAGE_BRAND_LOGO.description: Per-site business logo. Replaces the template's placeholder Imbo Agency logo. Original asset was a colored wordmark.

self_hosted_assets._usage_notes: Image-BG-Imbo-1.png is the shared decorative page hero background, referenced from about/contact/quote/services.json. Treated as a permanent template asset rather than a marker because all four pages use the identical image and the design depends on visual consistency.
